div.h1: Shared Memory Layout: Zero-Copy Message Bus

div.p: Total Region Size: 256 + (N * slot_size) + padding Cache Alignment: Fields 0x00 and 0x40 reside in separate L1 cache lines to prevent False Sharing.
Static Metadata uint64 num_slots, uint64 slot_size uint64 mask, uint64 seq_base
Process Coordination uint32 prod_pid, uint32 cons_pid uint64 prod_hb, uint64 cons_hb
